pages.title: The armor set
pages.text: Full-set protection values: boots 4, legs 8, chest 10, head 4. Toughness 3.0 across the board — above diamond, below netherite.$(br2)Two-tone visual: the inner $(6)meteor_layer_1$() plates with an outer $(6)meteor_layer_2$() etched pattern that glows faintly on a full moon.

pages.title: Meteor Chestplate
pages.text: Chest slot. Base defense 10 — the bulk of the set's protection.
